pik.description: Primary Identity Key (PIK). Root cryptographic identifier used in identity composition: [APA]=[PIK]-[VSIG].

cir_reference.description: CIR-backed registry identifier that this PIK is bound to. REQUIRED for identity validity.

key_type.description: Type of cryptographic key used for PIK generation.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the PIK within registry authority.

rotated_from.description: Previous PIK if this key is a rotation successor. Used for continuity tracking.

metadata.description: Non-authoritative metadata. MUST NOT affect identity resolution, registry state, RBAC, federation, or exposure decisions.
